headline: What’s Really Behind Plug Power’s 40% Jump?
summary: If you had invested $1,000 in Plug Power (NASDAQ: PLUG) five years ago, your stake would have dwindled to roughly $75 by early 2026—a staggering loss that reflects the brutal "cash burn" reputation of the hydrogen sector.

raw.headline: What’s Really Behind Plug Power’s 40% Jump?
raw.summary: If you had invested $1,000 in Plug Power (NASDAQ: PLUG) five years ago, your stake would have dwindled to roughly $75 by early 2026—a staggering loss that reflects the brutal "cash burn" reputation of the hydrogen sector.
